name: 18 Levels of Hells
short_description: 18 Levels of Hells is a time-survival, featuring bullet-hell & roguelite elements, folklore horror & 2D pixel-art, support up to 8 multiplayer online co-op. Players kill monsters, upgrade, unlock new weapon. Boss fights feature challenging rhythm-synchronized patterns.
detailed_description:
A time-survival, featuring roguelite and bullet-hell elements, folklore horror & 2D pixel-art, support up to 8 multiplayer online co-op. Every level (include the tutorial level) is guarded by big boss, featuring challenging rhythm-synchronized battle!

💡Game Tips

  • Kill monsters, collect souls, upgrade your hero.

  • Explore the map to discover teasures.

  • When events happen, stick with your teammates.

  • Let the best pc owner be the server host.

Background Story

The ruler of The Hell, King Yama is tired of endless torture toward the sins, it's time to find out another solution that shows how precious is the human walfare. As a legendary warrior, do you agree with it?
